SciFinder Export - Synthesis of Example Intermediate 3

Reference DOI: 10.1021/acs.joc.0c00001

Experimental Procedure

Synthesis of Example intermediate 3. To a solution of substrate 1 (120 mg, 0.50 mmol) in dichloromethane was added triethylamine (0.21 mL, 1.50 mmol) and methanesulfonyl chloride (0.06 mL, 0.75 mmol) at 0 C under nitrogen. The mixture was stirred for 2 h and then quenched with water. The organic layer was washed with brine, dried, and purified by chromatography to give product 2 as a colorless oil (145 mg, 82%).

Route Notes

The next step was heated in THF at reflux for 6 h and yielded 61% of Example intermediate 3 after purification by silica gel chromatography.
